---
title: "Conception Risk - Parnell CR function"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(devtools)
library(arrow)

source_url('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ParnellPharma/ParnellFunctionsPublic/refs/heads/main/parnell_calculate_CR_master.R')

events<-read_parquet('data/intermediate_files/events_formatted.parquet')
```


```{r}
bred_events<-events%>%
  filter(event %in% 'BRED')%>%
  mutate(floor_date_month = floor_date(date_event, unit = 'month'))%>%
  fxn_standardize_for_CR()%>%
  group_by(location_event, lact_group, floor_date_month, Rstandard)

test<-bred_events%>%
  fxn_calculate_CR_main()


```

```{r}

class_members<-c('Mark', 'Pat', 'Sarah', 'Luciano', 'Sam', 'Bryan')

sample(class_members, 6)

```
